title: Senior Software Engineer - Infosys Advisory Limited - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Infosys Advisory Limited - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Infosys Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Infosys Advisory Limited:
Infosys Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys Advisory Limited!
